meta.note: DRAFT ASSUMPTIONS. Every offer, price and claim here is unconfirmed until Stuart edits and approves it. No client names, testimonials or results may be attached until real ones exist.

items.name: Commercial Systems Audit
items.problem: Identify operating drag, workflow gaps, CRM friction, GTM friction and the highest-value improvements.
items.outcome: Identify operating drag, workflow gaps, CRM friction, GTM friction and the highest-value improvements.
items.primaryArtifacts: A prioritised 30 to 90 day commercial improvement plan.
items.buyerTrigger: Founder or MD who suspects the commercial engine leaks but cannot see where.
items.pricingLogic: UNSET. Value-based, never hours. Stuart to define.
items.proofRequired: Real case evidence needed before public claims. None attached yet.

items.name: AI Workflow Implementation Sprint
items.problem: Embed AI into one or more important commercial workflows.
items.outcome: Embed AI into one or more important commercial workflows.
items.primaryArtifacts: Workflow map, prompt system, source knowledge structure, governance rules, implementation plan.
items.buyerTrigger: A team whose AI adoption has become disconnected experimentation.
items.pricingLogic: UNSET. Value-based, never hours. Stuart to define.
items.proofRequired: Real case evidence needed before public claims. None attached yet.

items.name: CRM and GTM Operating System
items.problem: Cleaner source-of-truth logic, stronger pipeline discipline, clearer ownership, better handoffs.
items.outcome: Cleaner source-of-truth logic, stronger pipeline discipline, clearer ownership, better handoffs.
items.primaryArtifacts: CRM governance model, lifecycle design, dashboard specification, operating cadence, action plan.
items.buyerTrigger: Commercial leader who no longer trusts the CRM numbers.
items.pricingLogic: UNSET. Value-based, never hours. Stuart to define.
items.proofRequired: Real case evidence needed before public claims. None attached yet.

items.name: Pricing and Packaging Sprint
items.problem: Improve the value story, package architecture, willingness-to-pay logic, negotiation structure and expansion path.
items.outcome: Improve the value story, package architecture, willingness-to-pay logic, negotiation structure and expansion path.
items.primaryArtifacts: Pricing ladder, package structure, value fences, negotiation playbook, sales narrative.
items.buyerTrigger: Founder discounting informally and leaking margin.
items.pricingLogic: UNSET. Value-based, never hours. Stuart to define.
items.proofRequired: Real case evidence needed before public claims. None attached yet.

items.name: B2B Event Revenue Architecture
items.problem: Move sponsorship and event monetisation from inventory selling toward outcome-led commercial packages.
items.outcome: Move sponsorship and event monetisation from inventory selling toward outcome-led commercial packages.
items.primaryArtifacts: Sponsor outcome map, package architecture, pricing logic, renewal structure, value measurement plan.
items.buyerTrigger: Event business selling logo placement instead of outcomes.
items.pricingLogic: UNSET. Value-based, never hours. Stuart to define.
items.proofRequired: Real case evidence needed before public claims. None attached yet.

items.name: Fractional Commercial Leadership
items.problem: Reduce founder dependency, clarify commercial priorities, improve GTM execution, strengthen accountability.
items.outcome: Reduce founder dependency, clarify commercial priorities, improve GTM execution, strengthen accountability.
items.primaryArtifacts: Commercial priorities, operating cadence, leadership reporting, decision framework, execution plan.
items.buyerTrigger: Founder who is still the bottleneck for every commercial decision.
